item.name: Turali Beaded Lizard
item.description:
Easily identified by the round, bumpy scales that inspired its name, this venomous amphibian can be spotted in every corner of Tural.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: As potent as beaded lizard venom is, Mamool Ja are immune to its adverse effects, which would certainly explain why Mamook soldiers of eld coated all their arrows in the stuff.
